calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-04-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-21-2024 Continued To Sep-04-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Autumn Benavidez appeared by zoom for Sila Alvarenga.

The court stated that the parties are making progress but what complicates things is Juan having two adult children, what effect the disclaimer would have and that the disclaimer does not cancel the childrens' rights. The court also raised the issue of the children consenting to the cancellation of the disclaimer and stated that the declaration of Juan does not mention any assignment. Mrs. Benavidez raised the issue of filing a new assignment dated after cancellation of the disclaimer. The Waiver of Account and Report of Administrator, etc. is continued to September 4, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Magdaleno. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-02-2024 Continued To Aug-21-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-21-2024 Continued To Jul-02-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Autumn Benavidez appeared by zoom for Sila Alvarenga.

The court questions what happened with the disclaimer and noted that then there was an assignment. Mrs. Benavidez stated that she was trying to decide between the two and when she was e-filing her document, she accidentally included the disclaimer, that she is not aware that Juan has any children and that she filed a cancellation of the disclaimer. The court informed Mrs. Benavidez that typically disclaimers are not revocable. Mrs. Benavidez stated that Juan is willingly giving the property to his sister, that he has been in agreement from the beginning that his sister should get the property, and that the sister has been paying all of the bills and the taxes. The court stated that it would like to be sure that Juan does not have any children and requested that Mrs. Benavidez file a declaration to that effect. The court also stated that if there are any children that are underage, a guardian ad litem will be needed. The declaration is to include the names and date of birth of the children. The Waiver of Account and Report of Administrator, etc. is continued to July 2, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Said declaration is to be filed by June 4, 2024.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Tan. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-30-2024 Continued To May-21-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-20-2024 Continued To Apr-30-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-21-2024 Continued To Mar-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-27-2023 Continued To Feb-21-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Autumn E. Benavidez, Esq., via Zoom, for Sila Alvarenga, Administrator.

At the court's query, counsel offers clarification regarding the discrepancy caused by the disclaimer and assignments. Counsel confirms of her intent to cancel the disclaimer. The court instructs counsel to file an amendment to cancel the disclaimer.

The matter is continued to Feb-21-2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Svahlin. Not Reported.

Off Calendar Aug-24-2022 Continued To Sep-27-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Autumn E. Benavidez, via Zoom, for Sila Alvarenga, Personal Representative.

Counsel advises that a petition for final distribution is ready and intends to file it next week.
